items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the outcome of the persona scenario involving an audit trail between an 'AI agent' and a human actor. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the actual simulation of this scenario or the capturing of traces and snapshots as instructed. The lack of concrete evidence to support the expected result leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this exploratory step.
